text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, on my day off, I hear a familiar
voice in the shopping mall.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, Creek, you ready to roll?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I certainly am, Tamtam! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well if it isn't my trainer! You joinin' in on the
tussle?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya haven't heard? The mall's havin' a big blowout
sale today!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm here for Violet. ♪ They're a really nice brand
for ladies' fashion.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tamtam really is a veteran bargain hunter, so I'm
tagging along for some clothes shopping.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yep, just stick with the expert! Don't go strayin'
off either, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yep, now let's roll out!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That was a real skirmish, I tell ya... Definitely
tossed you two into the deep end.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But check out all the spoils! We made out like
bandits!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You grabbed this many Violet clothes? Oh! This is the item I said I wanted...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Heh! A senior's gotta look out for her juniors.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam, you're amazing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But everything here is in my size... I'd like you to
try on some Violet clothes too, Tamtam!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! N-nope, I'm good. Frills aren't really my
style, y'know what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-where's this comin' from?! C'mon, you know this stuff wouldn't suit me!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Well, why not have a little faith in your
trainer and try it on?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Lemme goooo! Just how strong are you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little later...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, I just knew it! ♪ You look wonderful, Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's huge on me! I look like a preschooler wearin'
your blouse like a dress!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, Tamamo Cross disappears
to get changed.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! An oversized hoodie with a lightnin' bolt
pattern on it! You sure got an eye for fashion!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah. I'm way better off wearin' cool clothes like this.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's my trainer! I know I can count on you to
know exactly what I like!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Aww, that's a shame... but the hoodie looks just
as lovely. ♪ The design really brings out your
sporty side.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam, why don't you get changed right away?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Gotta show off my style!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and Super Creek head happily
toward the changing rooms.
